assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Modal account and run the official Hello World example until its function executes in the cloud and returns streamed outputs.

first_success.outcome: modal run hello_world.py executes f.remote and f.map on Modal infrastructure and streams outputs back to the shell.
first_success.observable_signal: The shell shows streamed remote outputs and the app finishes successfully.

route_selection.surface: Modal Hello, world! through a first cloud function run
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Identity-provider signup then Hello World modal run
candidates.reason: Exact account-creation states between IdP choice and ready workspace are not publicly enumerated.

required_path.action: Create a Modal account through the signup identity-provider flow.
required_path.observable_result: A Modal workspace is ready for token setup.

required_path.action: Authenticate the local CLI or environment to Modal.

required_fields.label: modal token setup or equivalent auth command

required_path.observable_result: Local CLI can deploy and run apps.

required_path.action: Create hello_world.py from the official example and run it.
required_path.observable_result: Remote function outputs stream to the shell and the run completes.

prerequisites.description: A Modal account and authentication token are required; Modal has no local execution substitute for this route.

platform_outcomes.description: Modal builds the container image and executes functions in the cloud.

excluded.item: Reading the broader Modal guide beyond Hello World

uncertainties.question: What are the exact account-creation states between choosing an identity provider and reaching a ready Modal workspace?
uncertainties.impact: Blocks verified account and auth field counts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account walkthrough from signup through first successful modal run.
